title: Macrosyringion longiforum

Macrosyringion longiforum belongs to the genus Macrosyringion, which is a group of flowering plants. The genus Macrosyringion is part of the order Boraginales, which includes other flowering plants in the same family. Macrosyringion longiforum is also sometimes classified as a synonym of other related species within the same family.
